name: bluetti-mqtt-node
description: Windows-first TypeScript Bluetti BLE to MQTT bridge with a native Windows helper

scripts.clean: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('node:fs').rmSync('artifacts', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.helper:publish:portable: dotnet publish helper\BluettiMqtt.BluetoothHelper\BluettiMqtt.BluetoothHelper.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained false /p:PublishSingleFile=true /p:PublishTrimmed=false /p:DebugType=None /p:DebugSymbols=false -o artifacts\helper\win-x64-fdd
scripts.helper:publish:self-contained: dotnet publish helper\BluettiMqtt.BluetoothHelper\BluettiMqtt.BluetoothHelper.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true /p:PublishSingleFile=true /p:PublishTrimmed=false /p:DebugType=None /p:DebugSymbols=false -o artifacts\helper\win-x64
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run helper:publish
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run helper:build
